response.justification: Strong candidate with 19+ years of full-stack experience, proven senior-level capability, and current AI agent development work that directly addresses a required skill. Primary technology gaps (no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience) and lack of security/authentication details are learnable and can be verified in interviews. Identity inconsistency on resume (name vs. contact details) needs clarification but is likely explainable.
strengths: 19+ years of full-stack experience with multiple senior and staff-level roles; far exceeds 6+ year requirement
Current work in AI agent infrastructure and MCP development directly demonstrates required AI agent development experience
Strong alignment with core stack: extensive TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience; proven ability to pick up new frameworks quickly
concerns: Resume lists 'AISHA OKONKWO' as name but all contact details point to 'szabobogdan' — identity inconsistency requires verification
No explicit mention of Nest.js framework (primary stack) or Vitest (primary stack); no demonstrated security/authentication/authorization experience
Recent role at re:cinq started April 2025 with very short tenure; long history of job changes (though all at senior level) may indicate frequent pivots

key_factors.factor: Missing explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and security expertise
Current AI agent development and MCP experience
